definitions.definition_en: Anything considered highly desirable for its kind, especially a car.
definitions.example_en: My new car is a dreamboat.

definitions.definition_en: A person who dances the bop.
A musician who plays the bop genre.
A wuss; a person who refuses to perform a particular task due to an unreasonable fear.
Espousing, characteristic of, or relating to fascism.

definitions.example_en: You look quite piff today.
